What is up everybody? Alright, we are going to look at the zaps for the bring a friend challenge. Now the first zap you want to make is the bring a friend submission and I just made a folder for the member monetization play and add the zaps under there. Now the trigger is, excuse me, click funnels. That is the first thing you select and then the action you want to select is new contact activity. Click continue, connect your click funnels account, make sure that's connected. Once it's connected, click continue. This should already be connected especially if you have ALN already. And then you want to select the funnel that you are using, bring a friend challenge funnel in this case and it's going to come from the optin page. That should be the second page in your funnel. Then you want to click next and boom, make sure you already have a contact entered in your funnel step before you do this so that way you can pull a sample funnel. So next step is agile CRM. Sorry, the dog is going to bark in a second and finally throw his toy. So once you select agile, you want to create the contact and have your agile account connected already. And this is what you want in the contact. You want the first name, last name, email. And this by default is set, do not do anything. You want it to be at update existing contact in case there is an existing contact, won't get an error and zip your, if it says don't do anything, or if there is an existing contact, phone number's wrong. Anyway, it'll update it. So phone number is the next thing, not the tag, the tag that I use is BF, all caps, capitalization matters in agile. So you want to make sure it's the same across all platforms. This case, or I'm sorry, this tag is the tag that I use for the bring a friend challenge. And I think it's simple and it should be just like that. And then you can click continue. And third step, there is third step is front. So front and find the contact optionally create one, if none are found. So this will create the contact in your front account. And the handle sources phone number handle is the phone number. Make sure you check create front contact if it doesn't exist yet. You want a blue check mark. And then first name, last name, you want a space in between. So when you enter those enter them separately. And then the email address, phone number, simple as that. And then that is the first zap for the bring a friend challenge. And now the second zap is bring a friend console. All this is going to do is add a tag. So everything's the same. New contact activity, click funnels, and the options is where it changes. So all this part is the same as last step. But right here, under edit options, you want to use the thank you page still the same funnel, but you want to change it to the thank you page. And then you just click continue, it takes you to the next step, the next step, same thing, select agile. And then once you find agile, you want to add a tag to the contact. And then you select your actual account, and then it brings you to the edit template page. And contact email is what you want to use. Same thing, set it up like that. And the tag that you want to add is bf console. Now this is what the campaign is set to check exactly this. So you want to make sure on this funnel, or I'm sorry, on this zap, you have this exact tag, exact capitalization and exact spelling, everything needs to be the same or else the campaign will not work in agile. So other than that, that wraps it up for the zaps for the bring a friend challenge.
